title: dolichos corymbosus
intro: Dolichos corymbosus, also known as the cluster bean or Indian cluster bean, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. The health benefits of Dolichos corymbosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight management. Herbal preparations of Dolichos corymbosus can be found in various forms, including dried powder, capsule, and tea, and are often used to treat conditions such as diabetes and obesity.
